subject: A large mammoth-like humanoid creature in heavy armor stands on broken ice, holding a crystalline orb staff and a smaller relic weapon
description: A heavily built creature with mammoth-like features — tusks, thick fur-covered limbs, and a broad head — stands on shattered ice terrain. It wears large riveted metal pauldrons and carries a tall staff topped with a glowing ice-blue crystalline orb in one hand, and grips a smaller artifact weapon in the other. The background shows an arctic landscape with distant peaks and a pale overcast sky. The coloring is warm brown for the creature against cold blue-white ice and sky.
foreground: armored mammoth-like creature on broken ice holding a crystal orb staff
background: arctic landscape with snow and pale sky
emotion: stoic and resolute, weight of duty carried without complaint
